title: Why You Should Stay Invested in Intercontinental (ICE) Stock
text: A compelling portfolio, expansive risk management services, strategic buyouts, solid balance sheet and effective capital deployment continue to drive Intercontinental Exchange (ICE).

title: 5 Securities and Exchanges Stocks to Gain From Increased Trading
text: Product innovation, increased market volatility and a strategic economic market model are expected to aid Securities and Exchanges stocks like ICE, CME, CBOE, NDAQ and MKTX. However, compliance with regulations remains a challenge.

title: Why I'm Bullish On Intercontinental Exchange
text: Intercontinental Exchange continues to do extremely well despite macroeconomic headwinds. The company's exchange business and fixed income segments are more than offsetting weakness in mortgage services.

title: Intercontinental Exchange: Great Quality, Attractively Priced
text: Intercontinental Exchange is a fantastic business in a fantastic industry - a rare 'natural monopoly' whose returns are not regulated. I estimate a potential upside of 42% gain for its share price.

title: Hua Nan Investment Trust Selects ICE FactSet Carbon Neutral Megatrend Index for New Index Fund
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ICE today announced that Hua Nan has selected the ICE FactSet Carbon Neutral Megatrend Index for its newly launched Hua Nan Carbon Neutral Index Fund.

title: Europe's 2035 ICE Ban: BMW Is Potentially One Of The Least-Affected EU Automakers
text: The EU's 2035 ICE-powered vehicle ban provides automakers only about a decade of time to completely phase out ICE-powered car sales, which can devastate the industry. One of the biggest challenges facing automakers is providing Europe's middle class with EVs that will fully replace the utility of ICE-powered cars, for a price that most can afford.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For November 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of November. The watchlist posted a gain of 9.24% in October and is down 12.32% year-to-date.

title: Intercontinental (ICE) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Intercontinental (ICE) Q3 results reflect persistent revenue growth, driven by strong Exchanges and Fixed Income and Data Services. The results benefited from the strength of its technology and data services.
